name: Galena Mining Limited
summary: Galena Mining Limited engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral projects in Australia. It explores for copper, gold, lead, silver, zinc, and manganese deposits. The company owns a 100% interest in the Abra Base Metals project located in the Gascoyne region, Western Australia. It also holds interests on Jillawarra prospects. Galena Mining Limited was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Subiaco, Australia.
